Package org.web3j.protocol.core.methods.response

Class UserOperationReceipt

java.lang.Object
org.web3j.protocol.core.methods.response.UserOperationReceipt
public class UserOperationReceipt extends Object
UserOperation object used by EthGetUserOperationReceipt.
